Having trouble accessing GitHub? Try updating via [MirrorChyan](https://mirrorchyan.com/)
You can configure a [MirrorChyan](https://mirrorchyan.com/) CDK in settings to get updates from it's high bandwidth mirror
Press Ctrl+N to quickly create a new note
Supports mixed Markdown and LaTeX formula editing — perfect for text, logic, and a touch of academic pressure
Drag notes to category folders to organize them
Switch between light and dark themes in settings — for daytime, nighttime, and those moments you'd rather not be interrogated by your screen
Floral Notepaper is a free and open source software (FOSS), contribute your code on [GitHub](https://github.com/Achilng/floral-notepaper)
